title: Approaches to sociological research
paperName: Paper 1: Socialisation, identity and methods of research
summary: 9699 — positivist, interpretivist, and feminist approaches to sociological enquiry.
learningObjectives: Explain how theoretical perspectives shape method choice.
Evaluate feminist and postmodern critiques of research.
Link approach to validity, reliability, and objectivity.

simpleExplanation.title: Different lenses on society
simpleExplanation.summary: Positivists seek measurable, objective facts; interpretivists prioritise understanding actors' meanings; feminists challenge male-centred research.
steps: Feminist standpoint — gender bias in research.

sections.content: **Research approaches** (2.2) pairs with **2.1 methods**. Structure essays: **approach → method → evaluation**.
